product_surfaces: internal/mcp stdio startup route from entrypoint
internal/config startup loading and redaction consumed by entrypoint
freshness: current source build, local binary invocation, and test run
mocks_used: No external-service mocks. Entrypoint unit tests use in-memory Source and route seams to assert StartupDeps handoff; run.sh also invokes a real locally built binary for help, CLI route, MCP initialize, and MCP redaction paths without network access.
